positive: Minimalist stylized abstract celestial landscape featuring interconnected glowing geometric constellations and stylized crescent moons set against a deep indigo and dusty violet gradient background. Central composition with clean, strong silhouettes of abstract space elements. Highly detailed line work combined with smooth gradient washes. Emblematic, suitable for apparel printing. Cinematic lighting, ethereal glow, cosmic aesthetic, vector illustration style, perfect for screen printing, flat lay composition, high contrast, symmetrical composition.
